name: snout
description: Snout — open, transparent, IPSIE-aligned identity-trust scoring for SaaS vendors.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix web test
